Notice Of Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-10-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Petitioners Neu and San Francisco Deputy Sheriffs' Association's ("SFDSA") petition to compel binding arbitration is granted.

[See word minutes for details.]

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/EPS)
